title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> They must complete a high-risk, high-
content:
✔ They must complete a high-risk, high-reward challenge in Week 10 (persuasive speech, strategic debate, symbolic act of defiance).
✔ If successful, they seize partial control over the final project structure.

📜 Possible Rebellion Rewards
✔ Rebels can demand a format change (e.g., replacing an analytical essay with a creative project).
✔ Rebels can eliminate certain restrictions (e.g., allowing group submissions instead of solo work).
✔ Rebels can introduce a “counter-rule” that impacts the non-rebel students (e.g., non-rebels must cite a rebel-led discussion in their final project).

📜 The Consequence of Failure
✔ If the rebellion fails, all rebels suffer a permanent -15 XP debuff.
✔ The failed rebel leader must perform a public recantation (e.g., a live speech declaring why they were wrong).
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 276 (chunk 276/555)
